TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ancoh, title = Ancoh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ancoh} }

S.FORM: alang Ancoh ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 50 buwan, 112 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 59 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 53 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 46%, Bunun 5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ancoh hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Ancoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ancoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ancoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ancoh hya' ga Pacuya. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ancoh ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ancoh ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ancoh ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 50 buwan, 112 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 59 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 53 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 46%, Bunun 5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ancoh hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Ancoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ancoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ancoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ancoh hya' ga Pacuya. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ancoh ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ancoh ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ anʦ~ʨoħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na anʦ~ʨoħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na anʦ~ʨoħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na anʦ~ʨoħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na anʦ~ʨoħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na anʦ~ʨoħ ħjaʔ ɣa paʦ~ʨuja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ anʦ~ʨoħ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ anʦ~ʨoħ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
